method.name: Initialize
method.comment: Initialize with a specific printer name. Use GetUsbPrinterNames() or GetAllPrinterNames() first to discover printers. Returns True if successful.

method.name: InitializeDefault
method.comment: Initialize with the Windows default printer. Returns True if a default printer was found.

method.name: IsInitialized
method.comment: Returns True if printer is initialized and ready.

method.name: getCurrentPrinterName
method.comment: Returns the name of the currently configured printer.

method.name: getLastError
method.comment: Returns the error message from the last failed operation.

method.name: GetAllPrinterNames
method.comment: Get all installed printer names as a List of Strings.

method.name: GetLocalPrinterNames
method.comment: Get local (non-networked) printer names as a List of Strings.

method.name: GetUsbPrinterNames
method.comment: Get USB-connected printer names as a List of Strings.

method.name: GetDefaultPrinterName
method.comment: Get the Windows default printer name.

method.name: GetAllPrinterDetails
method.comment: Get detailed info for all printers. Returns a List of Maps with keys: name, location, driver, isDefault, isLocal, isNetworked, isUsb, status.

method.name: PrintLine
method.comment: Print a single line of text (adds newline).

method.name: PrintText
method.comment: Print raw text (no newline added, caller provides line breaks).

method.name: PrintCenteredLine
method.comment: Print a centered line on 80mm paper.

method.name: PrintSeparator
method.comment: Print a horizontal dashes separator line.

method.name: PrintSeparatorChar
method.comment: Print a custom separator line using the given character repeated count times.

method.name: BeginJob
method.comment: Begin a new print job buffer. Follow with formatting and Append* calls, then ExecuteJob.

method.name: ExecuteJob
method.comment: Send the built job buffer to the printer. Returns True if sent successfully.

method.name: AppendText
method.comment: Append text to the current job (no newline). Must call BeginJob first.

method.name: AppendLine
method.comment: Append a line of text (with newline) to the current job. Must call BeginJob first.

method.name: AppendCenteredLine
method.comment: Append a centered line to the current job. Must call BeginJob first.

method.name: SetBold
method.comment: Enable or disable bold text.

method.name: SetUnderline
method.comment: Enable or disable underline.

method.name: SetDoubleStrike
method.comment: Enable or disable double-strike mode.

method.name: SetReverseMode
method.comment: Enable or disable reverse (white-on-black) printing.

method.name: SetAlignmentLeft
method.comment: Set text alignment to left.

method.name: SetAlignmentCenter
method.comment: Set text alignment to center.

method.name: SetAlignmentRight
method.comment: Set text alignment to right.

method.name: SetCharSize
method.comment: Set character size multipliers (1-8). First param=width, second=height.

method.name: SetFont
method.comment: Set font: 0 = Font A (12x24, default), 1 = Font B (9x17, smaller).

method.name: SetLineSpacing
method.comment: Set line spacing in dots (0-255). Default ~30.

method.name: FeedLines
method.comment: Feed paper by N lines using current line spacing. Returns True if sent.

method.name: FeedDots
method.comment: Feed paper by N dots (precise). Returns True if sent.

method.name: CutPaperFull
method.comment: Full paper cut. Returns True if sent.

method.name: CutPaperPartial
method.comment: Partial paper cut (one point left attached). Returns True if sent.

method.name: CutPaper
method.comment: Cut with options: FullCut (boolean), FeedBeforeCut (int).

method.name: OpenCashDrawer
method.comment: Open cash drawer (standard ESC/POS, pin 2, 200ms). Returns True if sent.

method.name: OpenCashDrawerByKickCode
method.comment: Open cash drawer by manufacturer kick code. Maps: 1=Standard, 2=Citizen, 3=Star, 6=Sunmi.

method.name: PulseCashDrawer
method.comment: Pulse cash drawer: Pin (0=pin2, 1=pin5), OnTimeMs (1-8), OffTimeMs (1-8).

method.name: SetPaperWidth
method.comment: Set paper width in dots: 576=80mm, 544=76mm, 512=72mm, 384=56mm. Affects separator length and centering.

method.name: SetPaperWidthByName
method.comment: Set paper width by name: "_80mm", "_76mm", "_72mm", "_56mm".

method.name: GetCharsPerLine
method.comment: Get characters per line for current paper width (Font A, normal).

method.name: SendRawBytes
method.comment: Send raw byte array directly to printer (no ESC/POS wrapping applied).

method.name: SendPrintString
method.comment: Send a pre-built ESC/POS string (UTF-8). Caller provides all ESC/POS formatting, text, and cut commands.

method.name: SendPrintStringEncoded
method.comment: Send pre-built ESC/POS string with encoding (UTF8/IBM437/ASCII).

method.name: ConvertEscposRasterToPng
method.comment: Convert ESC/POS GS v 0 raster bitmap data (ImageParams + ImageData) into PNG bytes for Windows spooler printing. Returns Byte array (PNG), or Null on failure.

method.name: SendPngToPrinter
method.comment: Send PNG bytes directly to the Windows print spooler. The driver handles halftoning at native resolution. Returns True if sent successfully.

method.name: PrintEscposRasterAsPng
method.comment: Convert ESC/POS raster to PNG and send directly to the printer in one call. Returns True if sent successfully.

method.name: PrintBarcode
method.comment: Print a barcode. Use BarcodeType constants: 0=UPCA, 1=UPCE, 2=EAN13, 3=EAN8, 4=CODE39, 5=ITF, 6=CODABAR, 72=CODE93, 73=CODE128. Height (dots, default 162), Width (2-6), HriPos (0=none, 1=above, 2=below, 3=both).

method.name: PrintBarcodeCode128
method.comment: Print a CODE128 barcode with sensible defaults.

method.name: PrintBarcodeEan13
method.comment: Print an EAN13 barcode with sensible defaults.

method.name: PrintQRCode
method.comment: Print a QR code. ModuleSize 1-16 (typical 4-6). ErrorCorrectionLevel: 0=L(7%), 1=M(15%), 2=Q(25%), 3=H(30%).

method.name: PrintQRCodeSimple
method.comment: Print a QR code with default settings (size=4, M-level correction).

method.name: AppendReceiptHeader
method.comment: Append receipt header to current job: centered shop name, divider, timestamp.

method.name: AppendReceiptLine
method.comment: Append a receipt line item: ItemName left, Price right-aligned.

method.name: AppendReceiptFooter
method.comment: Append receipt footer: total, thankyou, cut. Call ExecuteJob after.

method.name: PrintFullReceipt
method.comment: Print a complete receipt in one call. Items is a 2D array: Array(Array(Name, Price), ...). Returns True if printed successfully.

method.name: PrintTestPage
method.comment: Print a test page demonstrating all printer features.

method.name: SetAsyncPrinting
method.comment: Enable/disable async printing (default: false = synchronous).

method.name: getLastJobSuccess
method.comment: Returns True if the last print job completed successfully.

property.name: CurrentPrinterName
property.comment: Name of the currently configured printer (read-only).

property.name: AsyncPrinting
property.comment: Enable or disable asynchronous printing mode.
